title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCLXVII. Paradoxes.
content:
If all the world was apple-pie,
        And all the sea was ink,
        And all the trees were bread and cheese,
        What should we have for drink?
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCLXVII. Paradoxes."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
